results.question: Which nodes are connected to UpdateDate where update_date is 2008-01-29, and also to another node?
results.schema:
Graph schema: Relevant node labels and their properties (with datatypes) are:
UpdateDate {update_date: DATE}
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (a:UpdateDate{update_date:'2008-01-29'})-[r]->(n), (n)-[s]->(m) RETURN labels(n) AS Interim, labels(m) AS Target
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:UpdateDate{update_date:'2008-01-29'})-[r]->(n), (n)-[s]->(m) RETURN labels(n)

results.question: Find the streams that were created before 2018 and have more than 5,000 followers.
results.schema:
Node properties:
- **Stream**
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2007-05-22T10:39:53.259969Z, Max: 2021-05-09T14:16:40.370294Z
  - `id`: STRING Example: "129004176"
  - `description`: STRING Example: "Welcome to my Channel, I'm Big Chase, 31 living in"
  - `url`: STRING Example: "https://www.twitch.tv/itsbigchase"
  - `name`: STRING Example: "itsbigchase"
  - `followers`: INTEGER Min: 0, Max: 10243195
  - `total_view_count`: INTEGER Min: 21, Max: 1451487256
- **Game**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "Rust"
- **Language**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "en"
- **User**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "itsbigchase"
- **Team**
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2011-10-11T23:59:43.548701Z, Max: 2021-05-07T17:19:09.946382Z
  - `name`: STRING Example: "ESO Stream Team"
  - `id`: STRING Example: "5893"
Relationship properties:

The relationships:
(:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(:Game)
(:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(:Language)
(:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:User)
(:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:User)
(:Stream)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(:Team)
(:Stream)-[:VIP]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:VIP]->(:User)
(:User)-[:CHATTER]->(:Stream)
(:User)-[:CHATTER]->(:User)
(:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(:Stream)
(:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(:User)
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.createdAt < datetime('2018-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z') AND s.followers > 5000 RETURN s
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (:Stream) WHERE EXISTS { (:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(:Game) WHERE EXISTS { (:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(:Language) WHERE EXISTS { (:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:User) } } WHERE EXISTS { (:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:Stream) WHERE EXISTS { (:Stream)-[:VIP]->(:User) } } RETURN DISTINCT (:Stream)

results.question: What are the top 5 tags used in questions with a score less than zero?
results.schema:
Node properties:
- **Question**
  - `favorites`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `answered`: BOOLEAN 
  - `text`: STRING Example: "### This is:  Bug    ### Specifications  OS: Win10"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/questions/62224586/playg"
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2020-06-05T16:57:19Z, Max: 2020-06-05T21:49:16Z
  - `title`: STRING Example: "Playground is not loading with apollo-server-lambd"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 62220505, Max: 62224586
  - `upVotes`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `score`: INTEGER Example: "-1"
  - `downVotes`: INTEGER Example: "1"
- **Tag**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "aws-lambda"
- **User**
  - `image`: STRING Example: "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NcFYSuXU0nk/AAA"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/users/10251021/alexandre"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 751, Max: 13681006
  - `reputation`: INTEGER Min: 1, Max: 420137
  - `display_name`: STRING Example: "Alexandre Le"
Relationship properties:

The relationships:
(:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(:Tag)
(:User)-[:ASKED]->(:Question)
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE q.score < 0 RETURN t.name, count(q) AS usage ORDER BY usage DESC LIMIT 5
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.score < 0 WITH q AS question, q.tag ORDER BY q.tag DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN q.tag

results.question: List the labels of users with an area less than 2 and a size greater than 1.
results.schema:
Node properties:
- **User**
  - `label`: STRING Example: "inchristbl.bsky.social"
  - `key`: STRING Example: "0"
  - `y`: FLOAT Example: "6000.659"
  - `color`: STRING Example: "#3CB371"
  - `x`: FLOAT Example: "-4383.217"
  - `area`: FLOAT Example: "2.6"
  - `size`: FLOAT Example: "1.82"
Relationship properties:
- **INTERACTED**
  - `weight: INTEGER` Example: "1"
  - `ogWeight: INTEGER` Example: "1"
  - `size: FLOAT` Example: "0.2"
  - `key: STRING` Example: "geid_68_0"
The relationships:
(:User)-[:INTERACTED]->(:User)
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.area < 2 AND u.size > 1 RETURN u.label
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.area < 2 AND u.size > 1 RETURN u.label

results.question: Find the title and the comments for those Article where title starts with O!
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (n:Article) WHERE n.title STARTS WITH 'O' RETURN n.title AS title, n.comments AS comments
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (n:Article) WHERE n.title STARTS WITH 'O' RETURN n.title AS title, n.comments AS comments AS comments

  - `name`: STRING Example: "ESO Stream Team"

Relationship properties:

The relationships:
(:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(:Game)
(:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(:Language)
(:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:User)
(:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:User)
(:Stream)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(:Team)

(:User)-[:CHATTER]->(:User)

(:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(:User)
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)<-[:MODERATOR]-(m:User)-[:VIP]->(s) RETURN s.name AS stream, m.name AS moderator_and_vip

results.question: Fetch the distinct values of the report_id from Report where either report_no is none provided or report_id is not null!
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (n:Report) WHERE n.report_no = 'none provided' OR n.report_id IS NOT NULL RETURN DISTINCT n.report_id AS report_id
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (n:Report) WHERE n.report_no = 'none provided' OR n.report_id IS NOT NULL RETURN DISTINCT n.report_id AS report_id

results.question: Search for the article_id values from 20 Article that are linked to Journal via PUBLISHED_IN with pages = 537-560, and return article_id along with the respective Journal counts!
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (n:Article) -[r:PUBLISHED_IN]->(m:Journal) WHERE r.pages='537-560' WITH DISTINCT n, m RETURN n.article_id AS article_id, count(m) AS count LIMIT 20
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (n:Article) -[:PUBLISHED_IN{pages: '537-560'}]->(m:Journal) WHERE m.article_id = '20' RETURN n.article_id AS article_id, count(m) AS count LIMIT 20

(:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(:Game)
(:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(:Language)
(:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:User)
(:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:User)

results.question: How many nodes are connected to Journal for which name is J. Number Theory, by exactly two different types of relationships?
results.schema:
Graph schema: Relevant node labels and their properties (with datatypes) are:
Journal {name: STRING}
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (a:Journal{name:'J. Number Theory'})-[r]->(n) WITH n, COLLECT(DISTINCT TYPE(r)) AS Types WHERE SIZE(Types) = 2 RETURN COUNT(n)

results.question: List the roles played by actors in the first 3 movies directed by Nancy Meyers.
results.schema:
Node properties:
- **Movie**
  - `title`: STRING Example: "The Matrix"
  - `votes`: INTEGER Min: 1, Max: 5259
  - `tagline`: STRING Example: "Welcome to the Real World"
  - `released`: INTEGER Min: 1975, Max: 2012
- **Person**
  - `born`: INTEGER Min: 1929, Max: 1996
  - `name`: STRING Example: "Keanu Reeves"
Relationship properties:
- **ACTED_IN**
  - `roles: LIST` Min Size: 1, Max Size: 6
- **REVIEWED**
  - `summary: STRING` Available options: ['Pretty funny at times', 'A solid romp', 'Silly, but fun', 'You had me at Jerry', 'An amazing journey', 'Slapstick redeemed only by the Robin Williams and ', 'Dark, but compelling', 'The coolest football movie ever', 'Fun, but a little far fetched']
  - `rating: INTEGER` Min: 45, Max:  100
The relationships:
(:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(:Movie)
(:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(:Movie)
(:Person)-[:PRODUCED]->(:Movie)
(:Person)-[:WROTE]->(:Movie)
(:Person)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:Person)
(:Person)-[:REVIEWED]->(:Movie)
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (director:Person {name: "Nancy Meyers"})-[:DIRECTED]->(movie:Movie) WITH movie ORDER BY movie.released LIMIT 3 MATCH (actor:Person)-[actedIn:ACTED_IN]->(movie) RETURN movie.title AS MovieTitle, actor.name AS ActorName, actedIn.roles AS Roles
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.title = "Nancy Meyers" WITH p, count(r) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN p.name

results.question:
Search for the journal_id in Journal that is linked through a PUBLISHED_IN relationship with Article where title is Classification of Subsystems for Local Nets with Trivial Superselection
  Structure and PUBLISHED_IN has meta on 217!
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (n:Article) -[pu:PUBLISHED_IN {meta : '217'}]->(m) WHERE n.title='Classification of Subsystems for Local Nets with Trivial Superselection   Structure' RETURN m.journal_id
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (n:Article) -[pu:PUBLISHED_IN {meta : '217'}]->(m) WHERE n.title='Classification of Subsystems for Local Nets with Trivial Superselection' RETURN m.journal_id

results.question: Which nodes have a common property with Article where article_id is 2007 and are PUBLISHED_IN linked to a Journal?
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (a:Article {article_id:'2007'})-[r:PUBLISHED_IN]->(b:Journal) WHERE ANY(key IN keys(a) WHERE a[key] = b[key]) RETURN b
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:Article {article_id:'2007'})-[r:PUBLISHED_IN]->(b:Journal) WHERE ANY(key IN keys(a) WHERE a[key] = b[key]) RETURN b

results.question: What is the total number of questions asked by users with a reputation greater than the average reputation of all users?
results.schema:
Node properties:
- **Question**
  - `favorites`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `answered`: BOOLEAN 
  - `text`: STRING Example: "### This is:  Bug    ### Specifications  OS: Win10"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/questions/62224586/playg"
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2020-06-05T16:57:19Z, Max: 2020-06-05T21:49:16Z
  - `title`: STRING Example: "Playground is not loading with apollo-server-lambd"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 62220505, Max: 62224586
  - `upVotes`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `score`: INTEGER Example: "-1"
  - `downVotes`: INTEGER Example: "1"
- **Tag**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "aws-lambda"
- **User**
  - `image`: STRING Example: "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NcFYSuXU0nk/AAA"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/users/10251021/alexandre"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 751, Max: 13681006
  - `reputation`: INTEGER Min: 1, Max: 420137
  - `display_name`: STRING Example: "Alexandre Le"
Relationship properties:

The relationships:
(:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(:Tag)
(:User)-[:ASKED]->(:Question)
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WITH avg(u.reputation) AS averageReputation MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.reputation > averageReputation RETURN count(DISTINCT q) AS questionCount
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.reputation > avg(u.reputation) RETURN count(u)

results.question: Is there a path connecting Author where first_name is Bernhard and Topic, for which description is Focusing on techniques and concepts related to transformations, solutions, and properties of linear equations and matrices, including Jordan normal form, eigenvalues, eigenvectors, diagonalization, and eigenformulations.?
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (a:Author{first_name:'Bernhard'}), (b:Topic{description:'Focusing on techniques and concepts related to transformations, solutions, and properties of linear equations and matrices, including Jordan normal form, eigenvalues, eigenvectors, diagonalization, and eigenformulations.'}) RETURN EXISTS((a)-[*]-(b)) AS pathExists
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:Author{first_name:'Bernhard'}), (b:Topic{description:'Focusing on techniques and concepts related to transformations, solutions, and properties of linear equations and matrices, including Jordan normal form, eigenvalues, eigenvectors, diagonalization, and eigenformulations.'}) RETURN EXISTS((a)-[*]-(b)) AS pathExists

(:Character)-[:INTERACTS45]->(:Character)
(:Character)-[:INTERACTS]->(:Character)
(:Character)-[:INTERACTS1]->(:Character)
(:Character)-[:INTERACTS3]->(:Character)
(:Character)-[:INTERACTS2]->(:Character)
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.book1PageRank IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS character, c.book1PageRank AS pageRank ORDER BY pageRank LIMIT 5
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.weight < 5 AND c.name = "Addam-Marbrand" RETURN c.name

results.question: Look for the comments of the Article that is not related  to the Report with the  report_id  5049b80a2935f95cc95cf14dbfb8c610!
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (n:Article), (:Report {report_id: '5049b80a2935f95cc95cf14dbfb8c610'}) WHERE NOT (n) --> (:Report) RETURN n.comments
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (n:Article), (:Report {report_id: '5049b80a2935f95cc95cf14dbfb8c610'}) WHERE NOT (n) --> (:Report) RETURN n.comments

results.question: For each Article, find the number of Author linked via WRITTEN_BY and retrieve the abstract of the Article and the Author counts in ascending order!
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (n:Article) -[:WRITTEN_BY]->(m:Author) WITH DISTINCT n, m RETURN n.abstract AS abstract, count(m) AS author_count ORDER BY author_count
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (n:Article) -[:WRITTEN_BY]->(m:Author) WITH n, count(m) AS count ORDER BY count DESC RETURN n.abstract AS abstract, count AS count ORDER BY count

results.question: List the properties of nodes that are 3 hops away from Article with article_id equal to 1063!
results.schema:
Graph schema: Relevant node labels and their properties (with datatypes) are:
Article {article_id: INTEGER}
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[*3]->(n) WHERE a.article_id = '1063' RETURN properties(n) AS props
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:Article {article_id:'1063'})-[*3]->(n) RETURN properties(n) AS props

results.question: How many paths are there between Author where last_name is Leoni and Topic, for which cluster equals 6?
results.ground_truth_cypher: MATCH p=(a:Author{last_name:'Leoni'})-[*]->(d:Topic{cluster:'6'}) RETURN count(p)
